question: What is LangChain?
answer: LangChain is a framework that provides flexible abstraction layers for building LLM applications, allowing developers to work at their desired level of abstraction and integrate with various products for a full suite of tools. [Source: data\raw\langchain_readme.md, Chunk ID: 5]

retrieved_context.chunk_text:
API Reference – Detailed reference on navigating base packages and integrations for LangChain.

Contributing Guide – Learn how to contribute to LangChain projects and find good first issues.

Code of Conduct – Our community guidelines and standards for participation.

LangChain Academy – Comprehensive, free courses on LangChain libraries and products, made by the LangChain team.

Flexible abstraction layers. Work at the level of abstraction that suits your needs - from high-level chains for quick starts to low-level components for fine-grained control. LangChain grows with your application's complexity.

LangChain ecosystem

While the LangChain framework can be used standalone, it also integrates seamlessly with any LangChain product, giving developers a full suite of tools when building LLM applications.

To improve your LLM application development, pair LangChain with:

To improve your LLM application development, pair LangChain with:

Deep Agents (new!) – Build agents that can plan, use subagents, and leverage file systems for complex tasks

LangGraph – Build agents that can reliably handle complex tasks with LangGraph, our low-level agent orchestration framework. LangGraph offers customizable architecture, long-term memory, and human-in-the-loop workflows – and is trusted in production by companies like LinkedIn, Uber, Klarna, and GitLab.

Integrations – List of LangChain integrations, including chat & embedding models, tools & toolkits, and more

question: Why would developers use LangChain?
answer: Developers would use LangChain for its model interoperability, rapid prototyping, and flexible abstraction layers, which enable them to quickly build and iterate on LLM applications, adapt to evolving industry needs, and work at their desired level of abstraction. [Source: data\raw\langchain_readme.md, Chunk ID: 3]

Model interoperability. Swap models in and out as your engineering team experiments to find the best choice for your application's needs. As the industry frontier evolves, adapt quickly – LangChain's abstractions keep you moving without losing momentum.

Rapid prototyping. Quickly build and iterate on LLM applications with LangChain's modular, component-based architecture. Test different approaches and workflows without rebuilding from scratch, accelerating your development cycle.

question: What are some use cases of LangChain?
answer: LangChain can be used for rapid prototyping, building and iterating on LLM applications, and integrating with other LangChain products for a full suite of tools. It also allows for model interoperability, enabling experimentation with different models to find the best choice for an application's needs. [Source: data\raw\langchain_readme.md, Chunk ID: 5]

question: What advantages does LangChain provide for development?
answer: LangChain provides several advantages for development, including flexible abstraction layers, model interoperability, and rapid prototyping. These features allow developers to work at their preferred level of abstraction, swap models in and out, and quickly build and iterate on LLM applications. [Source: data\raw\langchain_readme.md, Chunk ID: 5] [Source: data\raw\langchain_readme.md, Chunk ID: 3]

question: What is LangSmith used for?
answer: LangSmith is used for agent evals and observability, debugging poor-performing LLM app runs, evaluating agent trajectories, gaining visibility in production, and improving performance over time. It also allows for effortless deployment and scaling of agents with its purpose-built deployment platform. [Source: data\raw\langchain_readme.md, Chunk ID: 7]

retrieved_context.chunk_text:
LangSmith – Helpful for agent evals and observability. Debug poor-performing LLM app runs, evaluate agent trajectories, gain visibility in production, and improve performance over time.

LangSmith Deployment – Deploy and scale agents effortlessly with a purpose-built deployment platform for long-running, stateful workflows. Discover, reuse, configure, and share agents across teams – and iterate quickly with visual prototyping in LangSmith Studio.

Additional resources

LangGraph offers customizable architecture, long-term memory, and human-in-the-loop workflows – and is trusted in production by companies like LinkedIn, Uber, Klarna, and GitLab.

Integrations – List of LangChain integrations, including chat & embedding models, tools & toolkits, and more

[!NOTE] Looking for the JS/TS library? Check out LangChain.js.

Why use LangChain?

LangChain helps developers build applications powered by LLMs through a standard interface for models, embeddings, vector stores, and more.

Use LangChain for:

Real-time data augmentation. Easily connect LLMs to diverse data sources and external/internal systems, drawing from LangChain's vast library of integrations with model providers, tools, vector stores, retrievers, and more.
